scripts.dev: npx concurrently "npm run dev:client" "npm run dev:server"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=client && npm run build --workspace=server
scripts.test:full: npm run test:photos && npm run test:e2e && npm run test:report
scripts.test:visual-full: npm run test:visual-photos && npm run test:photos && npm run test:e2e && npm run test:visual && npm run test:report
